channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Cassandra and Justin Compete in 'Beklamation' on It’s Showtime
item.description: The article discusses the intense rivalry between Cassandra and Justin during the 'Beklamation' segment of the popular Philippine television show 'It’s Showtime'. The segment, known for its comedic an...

item.title: US and Iran Continue Talks Amid Ceasefire Suspension and Gulf Tensions
item.description: President Donald Trump announced that the US and Iran have agreed to resume diplomatic discussions despite escalating hostilities, but emphasized that the previous ceasefire agreement has ended. The U...

item.title: Zimbabwean Businessman Wicknell Chivayo's Expanding Political and Business Influence in Africa
item.description: Wicknell Chivayo, a Zimbabwean businessman with an estimated net worth of over $100 million, has been expanding his influence across Africa by cultivating relationships with political leaders and secu...

item.title: Mwanza Region Police Commander Assures Stability Amid Enhanced Security Measures
item.description: The Regional Police Commander for Mwanza, Wilbrod Mutafungwa, has reassured residents that security in the region remains stable and that daily life continues without disruption. He addressed journali...

item.title: Invasive plants threaten grasslands and wildlife in Manas Tiger Reserve
item.description: The Forest Department in Assam’s Bodoland Territorial Council (BTC) revealed that 14 invasive plant species have caused a 43.59% decline in grassland cover in Manas Tiger Reserve over 30 years. Grassl...

item.title: Celebrity News Roundup: Taylor Swift's Wedding, Anthony Hopkins' Career Shift, and More
item.description: The article compiles a series of celebrity news snippets, highlighting various updates from the entertainment industry. It begins with a sensationalized claim about an unspecified item 'E' used by Jus...

item.title: Cruz Hewitt advances to Wimbledon boys' final without dropping a set
item.description: Seventeen-year-old Australian tennis player Cruz Hewitt has made history by reaching the boys' Wimbledon final without dropping a set, becoming the first Australian to achieve this feat since Alex de ...

item.title: DP World Enhances Dar es Salaam Port Efficiency by Over 90%
item.description: DP World has significantly improved the efficiency of the Dar es Salaam Port by reducing vessel discharge time from over 300 hours to less than 28 hours. This achievement, part of a 30-year concession...

item.title: PM Shehbaz Sharif calls for responsible population planning to address rapid growth
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif emphasized the need for responsible population planning to manage Pakistan's rapid demographic growth, which is outpacing economic and social development. With an annual ...

item.title: Bangladeshi PM Sheikh Hasina's planned return to Bangladesh amid legal challenges and political tensions
item.description: Former Bangladeshi Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina, who fled to Delhi in August 2024 amid protests against her government, has announced plans to return to Bangladesh in December. In a telephone intervie...

item.title: The enduring impact of the West Philippine Sea ruling on Philippine sovereignty
item.description: The 2016 arbitral ruling affirming the Philippines' rights in the West Philippine Sea remains crucial for national security and economic stability. Legal experts emphasize that the decision secured ex...

item.title: Canadian Perspectives on National Identity and Policy Debates
item.description: The article compiles letters to the editor discussing diverse topics such as Canada's historical relationship with the United States, debates over health care funding versus education investment, conc...

item.title: Family of KMTC Student Speaks After Daughter's Death in Nairobi Hostel
item.description: The family of Ann Adhiambo, a KMTC student found unresponsive in her campus hostel room in Nairobi, has shared details about her death. Parents described multiple wounds on their daughter's ears, neck...

item.title: Man's Death Before Wedding Unveiled by Postmortem Findings
item.description: A postmortem examination of Kelvin, a young Kenyan man who died two months before his wedding, revealed he was beaten to death, not an accident. The findings, shared by family member Hillary via Whats...

item.title: Family Scandal: Ex-Husband's Infidelity Shocks Wife and Children
item.description: The letter writer reveals a shocking family secret that has resurfaced after 11 years: her ex-husband impregnated his brother's wife during a high-risk pregnancy. This betrayal, which occurred during ...

item.title: Kazuma Okamoto ties Shohei Ohtani's rookie HR record with game-winning blast
item.description: Kazuma Okamoto hit his 22nd home run of the season, tying Japanese-born rookie legend Shohei Ohtani's MLB record, to lead the Toronto Blue Jays to a 5-3 victory over the San Diego Padres. The three-ru...

item.title: Dauphin Hospital Closure Sparks Concerns Over Access to Healthcare
item.description: Residents of Dauphin, Manitoba, are expressing significant anxiety over the closure of their local hospital due to a flooded basement, which has left them without immediate access to medical care. The...

item.title: Ronaldo's Decline and Messi's Rise: A Fan's Perspective on Football Icons
item.description: This article reflects on Cristiano Ronaldo's career trajectory, highlighting his legendary achievements at Real Madrid and Juventus, while critically examining his struggles in the 2026 FIFA World Cup...

item.title: Supreme Court's Addendum Confirms Ram's Birthplace in Ayodhya Using Religious Texts
item.description: The Supreme Court's addendum, authored by one of the five judges on the Ayodhya Bench, references religious texts like the Ain-i-Akbari (a 16th-century Mughal administrative document) and the Bala Kan...

item.title: Military Officers Detained Over Alleged Coup Plot Face Access Restrictions Amid Torture Claims in Court Martial
item.description: A court-martial has sparked controversy as the Defence Intelligence Agency (DIA) barred lawyers and family members from visiting military officers detained over an alleged coup plot against President ...
